values.value:
<size=30>Blendshape Control Examples</size>

These are a bunch of example triggers for using the blendshape controls. Feel free to test them out, use or change them as you need!

If you use the VNyan Expressions menu, you could also add these blendshapes along in there too

if Cat Mode is on, the tail positions will still change randomly

<size=20>Scared Tail Expression</size>
Less tail movement, no reactiveness, faster tail movement, moves tail down

<size=20>Scared Sad Expression</size>
Less tail movement, no reactiveness, slower wagging, move tail down

<size=20>Happy Sad Expression</size>
More tail movement, faster tail wagging

<size=20>Expression examples</size>
Below are some ideas you could use for having your tail move in different ways to go along with model expressions
